concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive discussion of advisor Atlas Wang's paper retraction with specific links and claims of career-long fabrication, while subsequent insertion restores only milder version without the core allegation
concerns.excerpt: 听到有人说他造假我一点都不奇怪，他的 phd advisor Atlas Wang 就是靠造假起家的... https://www.zhihu.com/question/50508148

concerns.detail: Insertion contains insults directed at other editors ('通网吧', '洗地', implying ignorance/shilling) rather than criticism of advising practices
concerns.excerpt: 上面的通网吧，洗地也用心一点，当人google search都不会用吗
